title: selaginella puberulipes
intro: Selaginella puberulipes, also known as the hairy spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, rhizomatous perennial plant belonging to the family Selaginellaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella puberulipes include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
